mapper.sql: username, display_name, role, status, login_digest, login_salt, login_algorithm, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_user ( username, display_name, role, status, login_digest, login_salt, login_algorithm, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{displayName}, #{role}, #{status}, #{loginDigest}, #{loginSalt}, #{loginAlgorithm}, #{lastLoginAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
